rows.locks: The end-to-end chain starts from the real-title dogfood run over the existing Era I engine-builder deckbuilder and reuses openchrome, scenario verdicts, journal.md, and ledger.jsonl evidence.
Self-audit attribution maps failures to milestone evidence through loop-coverage attribution without introducing a new verifier or data plane.
Diagnosis explains and proposes a source-apply patch preview only; it never applies source, never bypasses gates, and keeps Rust kernel/evaluator scope distinct from game content.

The low-risk reversible path re-verifies through openchrome, four gates plus design-integrity, source-apply, rollback, kill-switch, and trust-gradient, then auto-applies only when evidence improves with zero human input.
The verified high-risk/source-affecting tail queues thin human go/no-go provenance and never auto-applies source-affecting mutation.
Optional oversight, override, and taste feedback remain read-only/provenance-only and cannot block the autonomous loop.
Coverage v65 composes M68 through M72 as test-only Rust regressions over existing artifacts; no new verification engine, data plane, or store is introduced.

boundary: Scenario Coverage v65 is test-only end-to-end regression coverage for the Era L autonomous self-validation and improvement loop over the existing Era I engine-builder deckbuilder. It composes M68 real-title dogfood run evidence, M69 self-audit attribution, M70 diagnosis and source-apply proposal, M71 re-verify/apply routing, and M72 optional human channel coverage. The autonomous detect-explain-trace-attribute-propose-reverify-apply loop completes with zero human input for the low-risk reversible path only after openchrome, scenario verdicts, the four gates plus design-integrity, journal.md, ledger.jsonl, loop-coverage attribution, evolve, source-apply, rollback, kill-switch, and trust-gradient evidence improve. High-risk/source-affecting changes are never auto-applied and remain queued for thin human go/no-go provenance. Optional human surfaces never block. No new verification engine, no new data plane, no new persistent store; Rust remains the data plane, Elixir executor remains unchanged, fun/taste and release go/no-go remain human Ring 2, Layer-3 remains DEFER, #1 and #23 remain open.
